comparison_baseline: Compare the PR #3001-derived Blackwell chunk candidate with a narrow recovered short-path fallback against the current tagged submission-v25 payload (v56_regcap) in the official-aligned CUDA 13.2 Modal environment.
reporting_basis: Official-aligned Modal environment (flashinfer/flashinfer-ci-cu132:20260401-2c675fb, flashinfer-bench GitHub main, cupti-python, use_isolated_runner=True, warmup=1, iter=5, trials=3).

reference_recon.note: The active submission now vendors the upstream PR #3001 Blackwell chunk path directly, then layers only the contest compatibility fixes: log-gate inputs, scalar gate precompute sidecar, explicit Int32 ceil_div, range_constexpr TMEM workaround, non-persistent launch selection, and the long-sequence cumprod-tail numerical fix.

runs.kernel: v56_regcap: v54a 40-pair dispatch with tighter chunk-kernel register caps
PR #3001-derived Blackwell chunk kernel + scalar CUDA gate helper, with a narrow recovered short CUDA fallback for tiny regression shapes

dispatch_logic.condition: (total_seq_len, num_seqs) in 15 tiny measured-regression pairs -> recovered submission-v25 short CUDA kernel; otherwise -> compute_gates scalar CUDA helper -> PR #3001-derived Blackwell chunk kernel
dispatch_logic.short_shape_path: The fallback is intentionally narrow and only covers the retained-run regression set: (6,1), (12,1), (13,1), (14,1), (16,1), (18,1), (23,1), (24,1), (28,2), (30,1), (32,2), (35,2), (40,2), (42,2), (46,2).
dispatch_logic.gate_precompute: Non-fallback shapes use the scalar compute_gates helper to materialize log_gate and beta.
dispatch_logic.kernel_notes: The vendored chunk kernel consumes log-space gates directly and includes the cu132 portability plus long-sequence correctness fixes validated during the upstream bring-up.

validation.candidate_status: 100/100 PASSED after an initial 42-workload partial sweep plus a retry that filled the remaining 58 workloads

decision.reason: This PR #3001-derived all-shape chunk candidate is materially faster than the current tagged submission-v25 across the official 100-workload sweep. The repository is now organized around that payload and awaits explicit user confirmation before commit, tag, and push.
